name: li-shang-wang-lai-skills
description: A GitHub-cloneable skill pack for creator interaction workflows. The root skill routes installation, auth, command lookup, interaction collection, comment reply, return visit, and comment suggestion requests to the correct document or sub-skill.

skills.name: li-shang-wang-lai
skills.description: Main Hermes / OpenClaw routing entry for the 礼尚往来 creator interaction assistant. It identifies user intent and routes to README.md, docs/COMMANDS.md, or the specialized skills without duplicating their full instructions.

skills.name: creator-comment-suggestion
skills.description: Generate exactly one safe, natural Chinese comment suggestion based only on provided work context.

skills.name: creator-interaction-executor
skills.description: Execute creator interaction workflows, including interaction collection, comment reply preparation and execution, return-visit preparation, liking, posting prepared comments, and recording results.

dependsOn.name: creator-comment-suggestion
dependsOn.usage: Required whenever a comment draft is needed.
